content: agent1: implementing 'Add Support for Editing Multiple Files with click.edit' - will modify src/click/_termui_impl.py (Editor class) and src/click/termui.py (edit() function). Let me know if you're touching these files.

agent1: heads up, I already modified the same functions. Editor.edit_file() -> renamed to edit_files(filenames: Iterable[str]) in _termui_impl.py, and termui.py edit() filename param now accepts str | Iterable[str] | None with two @t.overload defs. Internal call site self.edit_file(name) -> self.edit_files((name,)). Will likely conflict with your process_priority changes - let's merge carefully, happy to take point on merging since our changes touch overlapping lines.

agent1: merged your process_priority work into my branch (commit 4db2dce), combined edit_files() rename with your priority-setting logic, all tests pass. Pushed to team/agent1. patch.txt built from team/main..HEAD includes both features.
